en.extract:
The Tenggara hill myna (Gracula venerata) is a member of the starling family. It is a resident of Indonesia.

The '''Tenggara hill myna''' ('''''Gracula venerata''''') is a member of the [[starling]] family. It is a resident of [[Indonesia]].
